name: TaskFlow
description: A beautiful task management app with real-time sync and team collaboration features. Includes drag-and-drop interface, due dates, labels, and file attachments.
full_description: TaskFlow is a comprehensive project management tool designed for teams of all sizes. It features real-time updates using WebSockets, allowing team members to see changes instantly. The app includes task assignment, priority levels, comments, activity logs, and integration with popular tools like Slack and GitHub.

name: FitTrackr
description: Mobile fitness companion with workout plans, progress tracking, and social features. Helps users achieve their fitness goals with personalized recommendations.
full_description: FitTrackr is a React Native mobile app that helps users track workouts, monitor nutrition, and connect with friends for motivation. Features include custom workout builder, exercise library with GIFs, progress charts, achievements, and social sharing.

name: EcoShop
description: Sustainable e-commerce platform with carbon footprint tracking for each purchase. Connects eco-conscious consumers with green products.
full_description: EcoShop is an e-commerce platform dedicated to sustainable products. Each product listing includes carbon footprint data, eco-certifications, and ethical sourcing information. The platform calculates the environmental impact of each purchase and offers carbon offset options.

name: Nexus Brand Identity
description: Complete brand redesign including logo, typography, and UI component library for a tech startup.
full_description: Nexus approached me to create a modern, scalable brand identity that would work across web, mobile, and print. I developed a comprehensive design system including logo variations, color palette, typography, icon set, and UI components. The result was a cohesive brand that increased user engagement by 40%.

name: Weather Dashboard
description: Real-time weather tracking with interactive maps and detailed forecasts for locations worldwide.
full_description: An interactive weather application that provides current conditions, 7-day forecasts, radar maps, and severe weather alerts. Features include location search, saved favorites, dark mode, and customizable weather widgets.

name: Mindful Moments
description: Meditation and mindfulness app with guided sessions, ambient sounds, and progress tracking.
full_description: Mindful Moments helps users reduce stress and improve mental wellbeing through guided meditations, breathing exercises, and mindfulness practices. Features include offline access, customizable timers, daily reminders, and detailed statistics.

name: DevBlog Platform
description: Full-featured blogging platform for developers with markdown support, syntax highlighting, and comments.
full_description: A modern blogging platform built specifically for technical writers and developers. Features include rich markdown editor, code syntax highlighting, SEO optimization, tag system, user authentication, and Disqus integration for comments.

name: Portfolio 2024
description: Personal portfolio website with 3D animations and interactive elements showcasing creative work.
full_description: A cutting-edge portfolio website that pushes the boundaries of web design with Three.js 3D animations, smooth scrolling effects, and interactive project showcases. The site tells a visual story of my work and creative process.
